languages.text: Уцелевший при бомбардировке командный штаб — веский довод в пользу обороны.

traits.locale_text: Уцелевший при бомбардировке командный штаб — веский довод в пользу обороны.

languages.text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.

languages.text: Das Hauptquartier, das das Bombardement überstanden hat, ist ein gewichtiges Argument zugunsten der Verteidigung.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: Das Hauptquartier, das das Bombardement überstanden hat, ist ein gewichtiges Argument zugunsten der Verteidigung.

languages.text: Le quartier général de commandement, qui a survécu au bombardement, est un argument de poids en faveur de la défense.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: Le quartier général de commandement, qui a survécu au bombardement, est un argument de poids en faveur de la défense.

languages.text: 指挥总部在轰炸中幸存了下来，这是主张防守的有力论据。
languages.original_text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: 指挥总部在轰炸中幸存了下来，这是主张防守的有力论据。

languages.text: El centro de mando ha sobrevivido al bombardeo y constituye un argumento de peso a favor de la defensa.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: El centro de mando ha sobrevivido al bombardeo y constituye un argumento de peso a favor de la defensa.

languages.text: 司令部爆撃の生存者は、防衛のための強力な論拠となる。
languages.original_text: The survivors of the bombing of the command headquarters are a strong argument for defence.

languages.text: Bombardımandan sağ çıkan komuta karargâhı, savunma lehine güçlü bir argüman olarak duruyor.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters, which survived the bombardment, stands as a powerful argument in favour of defence.
